    Private Day Tours from Paris

    Every tour is 100% private : your group, your pace, your itinerary. Dedicated English-speaking driver, hotel pick-up, comfortable, spacious vehicle designed for long-distance journeys.

    Book your pivate tour

    Full day · 10–12h

    Champagne Private Tour — Reims from Paris

    Visit the Reims Cathedral, tour the famous Champagne houses (Taittinger, Veuve Clicquot, Mumm) and enjoy a private cellar tasting on this exclusive day trip from Paris.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    🥂 Cellar tasting / ⛪ Cathedral

    🌍 English guide

    Book this tour

    Full day · 12h

    Mont Saint Michel Private Day Trip from Paris

    A 12-hour private round trip from Paris to the UNESCO World Heritage abbey. Your driver waits while you explore the island at your own pace. No group, no stress.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    ⏰ Flexible timing /  🏛️ UNESCO site

    🌍 English guide

    Book this tour →

    Half or Full day

    Private Paris City Tour — Eiffel, Louvre & More

    Discover Paris's iconic landmarks : Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Notre-Dame, Montmartre, and Arc de Triomphe... With a private driver guide who adapts the tour to your interests.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    🗼 All landmarks / 🎨 Museum access

    📸 Photo stops / 🌍 English guide

    Book this tour →

    Full day · 11–13h

    Loire Valley Private Tour from Paris

    Discover Chambord, Chenonceau and Cheverny on a private full-day tour from Paris. Your dedicated driver adapts the itinerary entirely to your interests.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    🏰 3 châteaux / 🍷 Wine tastings

    🌍 English guide

    Book this tour →

    Full day · 12–14h

    Private Normandy D-Day Tour from Paris

    Visit Omaha Beach, Pointe du Hoc, the American Cemetery at Colleville and the Overlord Museum with a dedicated expert driver. Hotel pick-up in Paris included.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    👥 Private group 

    🌍 English guide

    Book this tour →

    Half or full day

    Giverny Private Tour — Monet's Garden

    A private guided visit to Claude Monet's house and famous water lily garden in Giverny. Can be combined with a visit to the town of Vernon. Hotel pick-up in Paris.

    🚐 Hotel pick-up 

    🌸 Monet's garden / ⏰ Flexible

    🌍 English guide

    Our promise

    Why choose Marcel Tours for your private tour from Paris

    Since 2021, we have been the trusted choice for hundreds of travellers seeking a private, stress-free and memorable experience outside Paris.

    Marcel Tours offers an unparalleled travel experience between Paris and other destinations. Located in the heart of Paris, we are proud of our fleet of 10 luxury vehicles, ranging from 3 to 22 seats, designed to maximize your comfort and meet all your expectations.

    ​

    Our Services

    Our Services

    Hotel pick-up included

    Your driver meets you at your Paris hotel or any address. No metro, no stress, no luggage to carry across the city.

    ​

    Premium Luxury fleet

    ​A fleet of 10 fully air-conditioned, comfortable, spacious vehicles designed for long-distance journeys, from sedans to 22-seat minibuses. Always immaculate, always on time.

    Unparalleled comfort

    Sink into a premium leather seat in a fully air-conditioned Mercedes. Spacious legroom, USB charging ports and Wi-Fi on board : travel between Paris and your destination in the comfort of a private lounge

    5-star rated service

    ​Consistently rated 5 stars on Viator and TripAdvisor by hundreds of international travellers. Your satisfaction is our priority.

    100% flexible itineraries

    ​Every tour is adapted to your pace and interests. Stop as long as you like at any site. No group, no fixed schedule, no rush.

    ​

     

    Travel with your pets

    No need to leave your furry companion behind. Marcel Tours welcomes well-behaved pets on all private tours. Simply mention your pet at booking and we'll ensure a clean, comfortable ride for every member of your family.

    Expert driver-guides

    Our multilingual drivers are passionate about their destinations. They share stories, history and insider tips throughout your journey.

    Eco-conscious travel

    We optimise routes and use low-emission Euro 6 vehicles. Explore France responsibly with a partner committed to sustainable tourism.

    ​

    ​

    Child safety

    All vehicles are equipped with approved child car seats and booster seats on request, at no extra charge. Our drivers are trained in safe family travel, so you can relax while the little ones enjoy the journey too.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Everything you need to know about private tours from Paris

    Can't find your answer? Contact us on WhatsApp, we reply within the hour.

    Yes. All Marcel Tours private tours and transfers include hotel pick-up and drop-off anywhere in Paris at no extra charge. Simply provide your hotel address at booking.

    We operate a fleet of 10 premium, comfortable, spacious vehicles, designed for long-distance journeys, from sedans (3 seats) to large minibuses (22 seats), all fully air-conditioned and meeting Euro 6 emission standards.

    Our team is multilingual. Tours and support are available in English and French, with other languages upon request. Customer support is available 24/7.

    A full-day private Normandy tour from Paris lasts 12 to 14 hours — approximately 2h30 of driving each way and 6 to 8 hours visiting the D-Day sites. We depart early morning and return by evening.

    Absolutely. Our fleet includes Mercedes Sprinter and Minibus models for groups up to 22 passengers. Contact us directly for a tailored group quote.

    We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially in peak season (May–September). Last-minute bookings are sometimes possible. Contact us directly by WhatsApp to check availability.
